name: Air Fryer Chicken Skewers Meal Prep
raw_ingredients: 1cm piece of fresh ginger (finely chopped or grated)
Combine garlic, ginger, lime juice, honey, soy sauce, sriracha, and salt in a small bowl.
Put the chopped chicken into a large bowl and pour in the marinade. Stir to coat, then cover and put in the fridge to marinate overnight.
When ready, take the chicken out of the fridge and chop the onion.
Assemble the skewers by threading each one with chicken cubes and onion alternately.
Place in the air fryer and cook for 10 minutes at 180C. Then flip and cook on the other side for 7-10 minutes.
Serve with basmati rice and veg of your choice.
Eat straight away or store in the fridge.
